summary: Both backend and frontend tested for the new Discover tab (Audius search + Paste URL). Backend 10/10 pytest cases PASS: /api/search returns real Audius hits with 'au_' prefix, honors limit, validates q; /api/url-check accepts soundhelix mp3 (ok:true), rejects non-audio HTML (415), rejects non-http (400), rejects unreachable host (502). Frontend (Expo web preview, 390x844 dark) renders 'DISCOVER / Find music', segmented control defaults to Search, all required testIDs present, live Audius search returned 19 'lofi' rows, Paste URL mode shows url-input + 'Download to library' + copyright disclaimer, segment switching preserves state, accent color verified as violet #7C5CFF (rgb(124,92,255)).

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking deprecation warnings in web console: 'shadow*' style props and 'props.pointerEvents' (carried over from prior iteration; purely cosmetic).

action_items: None blocking. Optional: migrate remaining shadow* styles to boxShadow and props.pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to silence warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py url-check: the 'not ... in (...)' expression on line 111 has operator-precedence ambiguity ('not (x in y)' is what is intended, and works here, but '(not x) in y' reads confusingly). Consider rewriting as 'ext = ...; if "audio" not in ctype and ext not in AUDIO_EXTS:' for clarity.
search.tsx is ~330 lines — still readable, but SegmentBtn and ResultRow could be extracted to /src/components for reuse.
online.ts downloadToLibrary has no progress callback — fine for MVP, but large Audius streams on mobile could benefit from a progress UI.
url-check accepts any size; consider capping content-length to protect mobile data (e.g., reject >100MB) in a future iteration.
seed_data_creation: None. Only read-only Audius search + url-check calls were exercised.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use mobile viewport 390x844 + await page.emulate_media(color_scheme='dark'). Audius search responses are live; 502 console errors on artwork/stream URLs are expected on web preview (CORS) per review brief. React-Native-Web's Alert.alert does NOT invoke window.alert in Expo SDK 55 — to assert alert content in Playwright, spy on console logs or assert DOM for the alert role=dialog instead. Backend endpoints to regression-test: test_discover_api.py.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. All acceptance criteria from the review request verified.
